button1.title: Library Section 1
button1.subtitle: A Book
button1.content:
There was a book on the floor. It was open to a page with a drawing
Full of weird symbols and shapes, and creatures.

Lot's of scribbles, and disturbing images.
It was like a diary, but at the same time, a way to keep sanity.

button2.title: Library Section 2
button2.subtitle: A Laptop
button2.content:
Same place, different stuff.
A Laptop, with only a notepad inside.
...And a hangman game.

button3.title: Library Section 3
button3.subtitle: A White Space
button3.content:
You've been living here for as long as you can remember.

Your own personal space, with nothing but a white background and a single light source.

Your own world.

button4.title: Library Section 4
button4.subtitle: An Imagination
button4.content:
Headspace?

A place where you can be free from the real world, and just let your imagination run wild.
A place where you can be anything you want, and do anything you want.
A place where you can be yourself, and not care about what others think.
A place where you can be happy, and not care about the past or the future.

But where will you go when you want to leave?
Where will you go when you want to face reality again?
Where will you go when you want to be with others again?
Where will you go when you want to be alone again?

button5.title: Library Section 5
button5.subtitle: A Truth
button5.content:
Why you keeping it by yourself?
Why you keeping it a secret?
Why you keeping it hidden?

They never knew, and they never will.
But you know.
You know the truth.
You'll always know the truth.
It's always has been inside you.
You cannot escape it.

button6.title: Library Section 6
button6.subtitle: A Library
button6.content:
There are books here, filled with stories and knowledge.
Filled with stories of adventure, romance, and mystery.
Filled with knowledge of science, history, and philosophy.
Filled with emotion, imagination, and creativity.

A place to escape, to learn, to grow.
A place to find yourself, to find others, to find the world.

A place, to gain wisdom, knowledge, and understanding.
A place, to find answers, to find questions, to find meaning.

A place, that has been lost, but can be found again.
A place, that has been forgotten, but can be remembered again.
A place, that has been destroyed, but can be rebuilt again.

Forgotten, but not gone.
Abandoned, but not lost.
Gone? Not really.

It's still here, waiting for you to find it.
It's still here, waiting for you to explore it.
It's still here, waiting for you to discover it.

It's still here, waiting for something to happen.

It's still here, right inside your mind.

button7.title: Library Section 7
button7.subtitle: The Sin
button7.content:
We made mistakes, and that's okay, right?
All the sins he made, every single one.
Every bad things he did.
Has turned into one.
What we call him, 'Tsumi'.

He is all his mistakes.
He is all his sins.
He is all his bad things.
He is all his wrongs.

He takes control.
He takes over.
He takes everything.

He did it one time, that's all it took.
He's here, because of him.
He's here, for him.

* Persist
* Surrender ❤️

button8.title: Library Section 8
button8.subtitle: Hatred
button8.content:
Same place, different stuff.
A Laptop, with only a notepad inside.
...And a hangman game.

button9.title: Library Section 9
button9.subtitle: [LOST]
button9.content:
Same place, different stuff.
A Laptop, with only a notepad inside.
...And a hangman game.
